# D20 Test

D20 Tests encompass the three main d20 rolls of the game: [[ability_check checks]], [[attack_roll rolls]], and [[saving_throw throws]]. If something in the game affects D20 Tests, it affects all three of these rolls. The DM determines whether a D20 Test is warranted in a given circumstance.
